Genes.Enzyme_Name_or_Function: Geissoschizine oxidase; converts geissoschizine to dehydropreakuammicine/akuammicine (cytochrome P450)
Geissoschizine oxidase; converts geissoschizine to akuammicine via dehydropreakuammicine
Dehydropreakuammicine acetyl(ester)ase; hydrolyses ester moiety of dehydropreakuammicine leading to decarboxylation and formation of norfluorocurarine
Norfluorocurarine reductase; reduces norfluorocurarine to dehydrodesacetylakuammiline or downstream intermediate toward Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde
Aldehyde oxidase or oxidoreductase involved in conversion of intermediates toward Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde
Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde synthase; catalyzes formation of Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde from upstream intermediate
Strychnine synthase or acetyl-CoA-dependent enzyme; converts Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde to prestrychnine/strychnine via acetate incorporation and ring G cyclization
Strychnine hydroxylase; hydroxylates strychnine toward brucine biosynthesis
Methyltransferase; methylates hydroxylated strychnine intermediate to form brucine
Diaboline synthase or enzyme involved in diaboline biosynthesis from Wieland-Gumlich aldehyde pathway
